prompt: A photorealistic overhead shot of a steaming bowl of tonkotsu ramen on a dark wooden table. The ramen has rich creamy white broth, curly noodles, two slices of chashu pork, a soft-boiled egg cut in half showing orange yolk, green scallions, half a sheet of nori, a sprinkle of black sesame, and a small mound of finely chopped white onion. Beside the bowl: chopsticks resting on a small ceramic chopstick rest, a small dish of red pickled ginger. Warm soft natural light from upper left, gentle steam rising. Tabletop has subtle wood grain texture. Food photography aesthetic, shallow depth at bowl edges.
